_comment: Captured error shapes per OperatorEventKind. Real API keys/IDs have been scrubbed.

credentials-expired._source: Anthropic API — 401 with authentication_error + expired hint

error.message: Your API key has expired. Please refresh your credentials.

credentials-expired._source: Anthropic API — authentication_error at top level with expired token message
credentials-expired.message: OAuth token expired, please re-authenticate to continue

error.message: Invalid API key provided. Check your API key and try again.

credentials-invalid._source: Anthropic API — authentication_error without expired hint

error.message: Your API key is not valid. Please check your API key.
Your credit balance is too low to complete this request. Please add credits at console.anthropic.com.

quota-exhausted._source: Anthropic API — 529 overloaded_error (Claude Code converts to quota-exhausted)
Synthetic — set by session-tail after repeated 429 + slot exhaustion

error.message: Rate limit exceeded. Please retry after 60 seconds.

agent-crashed._source: Synthetic — emitted by IPC bridge when Claude child exits nonzero
Synthetic — emitted by session-tail on socket disconnect

agent-restarted-unexpectedly._source: Synthetic — emitted by gateway boot-banner diff when uptime drops unexpectedly
agent-restarted-unexpectedly.message: Agent restarted while user session was active

agent-restarted-unexpectedly._source: Synthetic — systemd watchdog detects unexpected restart
agent-restarted-unexpectedly.message: systemd unit restarted outside of operator request

unknown-4xx._source: Novel 4xx not matching any known Anthropic error type
